tools.name: search_docs
tools.description: Search the published Tandem docs index for relevant pages.

tools.name: get_doc
tools.description: Fetch and normalize a published Tandem docs page by path or URL.

tools.name: get_start_path
tools.description: Recommend the best Tandem docs starting path for a desktop user, server admin, or developer.

tools.name: recommend_next_docs
tools.description: Recommend the next Tandem docs to read after a current page, optionally biased toward a goal.

tools.name: answer_how_to
tools.description: Answer how to install or use Tandem, build workflows, or use the SDKs by synthesizing relevant published docs.

tools.name: get_tandem_guide
tools.description: Return a structured Tandem learning guide for install-engine, python-sdk, typescript-sdk, build-workflows, or headless-deploy.

tools.name: warmup_docs_cache
tools.description: Refresh the docs index and preload the most important Tandem docs pages into cache.

tools.name: get_docs_cache_status
tools.description: Inspect the current docs cache state for index sources and warmed pages.

tools.name: refresh_docs_index
tools.description: Force-refresh docs indexes and report whether data came from the network, cache, or stale fallback.

tools.name: refresh_doc_page
tools.description: Force-refresh a docs page and report whether content came from the network, cache, or stale fallback.

tools.name: invalidate_docs_cache
tools.description: Invalidate docs cache entries for index data, all pages, or a specific page path.

tools.name: compare_docs_index_refresh
tools.description: Force-refresh the docs indexes and return before/after hashes so content changes can be proven.

tools.name: compare_doc_page_refresh
tools.description: Force-refresh a docs page and return before/after hashes so page content changes can be proven.
